title: Liquidity-Aware Symbol Filter — Pre-Trade ADV and Spread Screen
summary: Add a pre-trade liquidity screen that checks estimated bid-ask spread (proxied from yfinance tick or 1-minute OHLCV data) and ADV (average daily volume) before allowing order submission. Research from market microstructure literature consistently shows that low-liquidity instruments produce the worst retail execution outcomes, and that retail traders face elevated adverse selection costs on thinly-traded names. This is especially relevant for Decifer's short-candidate scanner which may surface small/mid-cap names with wide spreads.
expected_impact: Prevents routing orders into illiquid names where spread alone costs 10–50 bps; eliminating bottom-quintile liquidity trades from the universe can reduce average slippage by 15–30% across the portfolio
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
